trans-unit.source: Access string has invalid syntax.
trans-unit.target: A cadeia de caracteres de acesso tem sintaxe inválida.

trans-unit.source: Expected collections to have matching element occurrences.
trans-unit.target: Expected collections to have matching element occurrences.

trans-unit.source: Expected all items to be unique.
trans-unit.target: Expected all items to be unique.

trans-unit.source: Expected all elements to match the predicate.
trans-unit.target: Expected all elements to match the predicate.

trans-unit.source: Case differs.
trans-unit.target: Case differs.

trans-unit.source: Expected difference to be no greater than {0}.
trans-unit.target: Expected difference to be no greater than {0}.

trans-unit.source: Expected values to be equal.
trans-unit.target: Expected values to be equal.

trans-unit.source: String lengths are both {0} but differ at index {1}.
trans-unit.target: Os comprimentos de cadeia de caracteres são ambos {0}, mas diferem no índice {1}.

trans-unit.source: Expected string length {0} but was {1}.
trans-unit.target: Comprimento esperado da cadeia de caracteres {0}, mas foi {1}.

trans-unit.source: Expected collections to be equivalent.
trans-unit.target: Expected collections to be equivalent.

trans-unit.source: Expected difference to be greater than {0}.
trans-unit.target: Expected difference to be greater than {0}.

trans-unit.source: Expected values to not be equal.
trans-unit.target: Expected values to not be equal.

trans-unit.source: Expected references to be different.
trans-unit.target: Expected references to be different.

trans-unit.source: Expected references to be the same.
trans-unit.target: Expected references to be the same.

trans-unit.source: Do not pass value types to AreSame(). Values converted to Object will never be the same. Consider using AreEqual(). {0}
trans-unit.target: Não passe tipos de valores para AreSame(). Os valores convertidos para Object nunca serão os mesmos. Considere usar AreEqual(). {0}

trans-unit.source: Objects are equal.
trans-unit.target: Objects are equal.

trans-unit.source: Objects are not equal.
trans-unit.target: Objects are not equal.

trans-unit.source: Expected {0} to equal {1}.
trans-unit.target: Expected {0} to equal {1}.

trans-unit.source: Expected {0} to be false.
trans-unit.target: Expected {0} to be false.

trans-unit.source: Expected {0} to be true.
trans-unit.target: Expected {0} to be true.

trans-unit.source: Expected {0} to be greater than {1}.
trans-unit.target: Expected {0} to be greater than {1}.

trans-unit.source: Expected {0} to be greater than or equal to {1}.
trans-unit.target: Expected {0} to be greater than or equal to {1}.

trans-unit.source: Expected {0} to be less than {1}.
trans-unit.target: Expected {0} to be less than {1}.

trans-unit.source: Expected {0} to be less than or equal to {1}.
trans-unit.target: Expected {0} to be less than or equal to {1}.

trans-unit.source: Expected {0} to not equal {1}.
trans-unit.target: Expected {0} to not equal {1}.

trans-unit.source: Both collections are empty.
trans-unit.target: Both collections are empty.

trans-unit.source: Both collections contain the same elements.
trans-unit.target: Ambas as coleções contêm os mesmos elementos.

trans-unit.source: Both collection references point to the same collection object.
trans-unit.target: Both collection references point to the same collection object.

trans-unit.source: Both collections contain the same elements.
trans-unit.target: Both collections contain the same elements.

trans-unit.source: Expected collection to contain the specified item.
trans-unit.target: Expected collection to contain the specified item.

trans-unit.source: Expected at least one item to match the predicate.
trans-unit.target: Expected at least one item to match the predicate.

trans-unit.source: Expected collection to contain exactly one item but found {0} item(s).
trans-unit.target: Expected collection to contain exactly one item but found {0} item(s).

trans-unit.source: Expected exactly one item to match the predicate but found {0} item(s).
trans-unit.target: Expected exactly one item to match the predicate but found {0} item(s).

trans-unit.source: Expected string to contain the specified substring.
trans-unit.target: Expected string to contain the specified substring.

trans-unit.source: Expected collection to not contain the specified item.
trans-unit.target: Expected collection to not contain the specified item.

trans-unit.source: Expected no items to match the predicate.
trans-unit.target: Expected no items to match the predicate.

trans-unit.source: Expected string to not contain the specified substring.
trans-unit.target: Expected string to not contain the specified substring.

trans-unit.source: Expected string to not end with the specified suffix.
trans-unit.target: Expected string to not end with the specified suffix.

trans-unit.source: Expected string to not match the specified pattern.
trans-unit.target: Expected string to not match the specified pattern.

trans-unit.source: Expected string to not start with the specified prefix.
trans-unit.target: Expected string to not start with the specified prefix.

trans-unit.source: Dynamic data field '{0}' should be static.
trans-unit.target: O campo de dados dinâmicos '{0}' deve ser estático.

trans-unit.source: Dynamic data method '{0}' should be static, non-generic, and cannot have 'params' parameter.
trans-unit.target: O método de dados dinâmicos '{0}' deve ser estático, não genérico e não pode ter um parâmetro 'params'.

trans-unit.source: Dynamic data property '{0}' should be static and have a getter.
trans-unit.target: A propriedade de dados dinâmicos "{0}" deve ser estática e ter um getter.

trans-unit.source: The dynamic data source '{0}' in type '{1}' should exist and be a property, a method, or a field.
trans-unit.target: A fonte de dados dinâmica '{0}' do tipo '{1}' deve existir e ser uma propriedade, um método ou um campo.

trans-unit.source: Expected the same number of elements in the collections.
trans-unit.target: Expected the same number of elements in the collections.

trans-unit.source: Element at index {0} do not match.
trans-unit.target: Element at index {0} do not match.

trans-unit.source: Element at index {0} is not of the expected type.
trans-unit.target: Element at index {0} is not of the expected type.

trans-unit.source: {0} failed. {1}
trans-unit.target: {0} falhou. {1}

trans-unit.source: Expected string to end with the specified suffix.
trans-unit.target: Expected string to end with the specified suffix.

trans-unit.source: Expected collection to have {0} item(s) but found {1}.
trans-unit.target: Expected collection to have {0} item(s) but found {1}.

trans-unit.source: The property 'TestContext.{0}' is related to current test is not available during assembly or class fixtures.
trans-unit.target: A propriedade "TestContext.{0}" está relacionada ao teste atual não está disponível durante os acessórios de assembly ou classe.

trans-unit.source: Invalid GitHub ticket URL
trans-unit.target: URL de tíquete do GitHub inválida

trans-unit.source: Expected value to be exactly {0}.
trans-unit.target: Expected value to be exactly {0}.

trans-unit.source: Expected condition to be false.
trans-unit.target: Expected condition to be false.

trans-unit.source: Expected value {0} to be greater than {1}.
trans-unit.target: Expected value {0} to be greater than {1}.

trans-unit.source: Expected value {0} to be greater than or equal to {1}.
trans-unit.target: Expected value {0} to be greater than or equal to {1}.

trans-unit.source: Expected value {0} to be in range [{1}, {2}].
trans-unit.target: Expected value {0} to be in range [{1}, {2}].

trans-unit.source: The maximum value must be greater than or equal to the minimum value.
trans-unit.target: O valor máximo deve ser maior ou igual ao valor mínimo.

trans-unit.source: Expected value to be an instance of {0}.
trans-unit.target: Expected value to be an instance of {0}.

trans-unit.source: Expected value {0} to be less than {1}.
trans-unit.target: Expected value {0} to be less than {1}.

trans-unit.source: Expected value {0} to be less than or equal to {1}.
trans-unit.target: Expected value {0} to be less than or equal to {1}.

trans-unit.source: Expected value to be negative.
trans-unit.target: Expected value to be negative.

trans-unit.source: Expected collection to not be empty.
trans-unit.target: Expected collection to not be empty.

trans-unit.source: Expected value to not be exactly {0}.
trans-unit.target: Expected value to not be exactly {0}.

trans-unit.source: Expected value to not be an instance of {0}.
trans-unit.target: Expected value to not be an instance of {0}.

trans-unit.source: Expected value to not be null.
trans-unit.target: Expected value to not be null.

trans-unit.source: Expected value to be null.
trans-unit.target: Expected value to be null.

trans-unit.source: Expected value to be positive.
trans-unit.target: Expected value to be positive.

trans-unit.source: Expected condition to be true.
trans-unit.target: Expected condition to be true.

trans-unit.source: Expected string to match the specified pattern.
trans-unit.target: Expected string to match the specified pattern.

trans-unit.source: Expected an exception to be thrown.
trans-unit.target: Expected an exception to be thrown.

trans-unit.source: The member specified ({0}) could not be found. You might need to regenerate your private accessor, or the member may be private and defined on a base class. If the latter is true, you need to pass the type that defines the member into PrivateObject's constructor.
trans-unit.target: O membro especificado ({0}) não pôde ser encontrado. Talvez seja necessário gerar novamente seu acessador particular ou o membro pode ser particular e definido em uma classe base. Se o último caso for verdadeiro, será necessário passar o tipo que define o membro no construtor do PrivateObject.

trans-unit.source: The constructor with the specified signature could not be found. You might need to regenerate your private accessor, or the member may be private and defined on a base class. If the latter is true, you need to pass the type that defines the member into PrivateObject's constructor.
trans-unit.target: O construtor com a assinatura especificada não pôde ser encontrado. Talvez seja necessário gerar novamente seu acessador particular ou o membro pode ser particular e definido em uma classe base. Se o último caso for verdadeiro, será necessário passar o tipo que define o membro para o construtor do PrivateObject.

trans-unit.source: The parameter '{0}' is invalid. The value cannot be null.
trans-unit.target: O parâmetro '{0}' é inválido. O valor não pode ser nulo.

trans-unit.source: Different number of elements.
trans-unit.target: Número diferente de elementos.

trans-unit.source: Element(s) <{0}> is/are not present in the collection.
trans-unit.target: O(s) elemento(s) <{0}> não está/estão presente(s) na coleção.

trans-unit.source: The property {0} has type {1}; expected type {2}.
trans-unit.target: A propriedade {0} é do tipo {1}; o tipo esperado era {2}.

trans-unit.source: (null)
trans-unit.target: (nulo)

trans-unit.source: (object)
trans-unit.target: (objeto)

trans-unit.source: Expected string to start with the specified prefix.
trans-unit.target: Expected string to start with the specified prefix.

trans-unit.source: (Failed to get the message for an exception of type {0} due to an exception.)
trans-unit.target: (Falha ao obter a mensagem para uma exceção do tipo {0} devido a uma exceção.)

trans-unit.source: Property or method {0} on {1} return type is not assignable to 'IEnumerable'.
trans-unit.target: A propriedade ou o método {0} no tipo de retorno {1} não podem ser atribuídos a "IEnumerable".

trans-unit.source: Value returned by property or method {0} shouldn't be null.
trans-unit.target: O valor retornado pela propriedade ou o método {0} não deve ser nulo null.

trans-unit.source: Method {0} must match the expected signature: public static {1} {0}({2}).
trans-unit.target: O método {0} deve corresponder à assinatura esperada: public static {1} {0}({2}).

trans-unit.source: Property or method {0} on {1} returns empty IEnumerable<object[]>.
trans-unit.target: A propriedade ou o método {0} em {1} retorna um IEnumerable<object[]> vazio.

trans-unit.source: Assert.Equals should not be used for Assertions. Please use Assert.AreEqual & overloads instead.
trans-unit.target: Assert.Equals não deveria ser usado para Declarações. Use Assert.AreEqual e sobrecargas em seu lugar.

trans-unit.source: Assert.ReferenceEquals should not be used for Assertions. Please use Assert.AreSame & overloads instead.
trans-unit.target: Assert.ReferenceEquals não deve ser usado com as Declarações. Em vez disso, use Assert.AreSame e as sobrecargas.

trans-unit.source: StringAssert.Equals should not be used for Assertions. Please use StringAssert methods or Assert.AreEqual & overloads instead.
trans-unit.target: StringAssert.Equals não deve ser usado com as Declarações. Em vez disso, use os métodos StringAssert ou Assert.AreEqual e as sobrecargas.

trans-unit.source: StringAssert.ReferenceEquals should not be used for Assertions. Please use StringAssert methods or Assert.AreSame & overloads instead.
trans-unit.target: StringAssert.ReferenceEquals não deve ser usado com as Declarações. Em vez disso, use os métodos StringAssert ou Assert.AreSame e as sobrecargas.

trans-unit.source: CollectionAssert.Equals should not be used for Assertions. Please use CollectionAssert.AreEqual & overloads instead.
trans-unit.target: CollectionAssert.Equals não deve ser usado com as Declarações. Em vez disso, use CollectionAssert.AreEqual e as sobrecargas.

trans-unit.source: CollectionAssert.ReferenceEquals should not be used for Assertions. Please use CollectionAssert methods or Assert.AreSame & overloads instead.
trans-unit.target: CollectionAssert.ReferenceEquals não deve ser usado com as Declarações. Em vez disso, use os métodos CollectionAssert ou Assert.AreSame e as sobrecargas.

trans-unit.source: Expected the specified exception type to be thrown.
trans-unit.target: Expected the specified exception type to be thrown.
